deploy/charts.purpose: Organisational parent for the two Helm charts (benthos-collector, openmeter) that package all OpenMeter Kubernetes workloads. Each child chart is independently versioned and published to GHCR OCI registry; this folder owns the shared helm-docs generation pipeline (Makefile + template.md) used by both charts.

patterns.name: helm-docs via shared template
patterns.description: README for each child chart is generated by `helm-docs` using the shared template.md defined here. Run `make docs` from this folder to regenerate both READMEs. Never hand-edit a chart README.
patterns.example: make docs  # invokes helm-docs with template.md for all child charts

patterns.name: OCI Helm registry distribution
patterns.description: Charts are packaged with `helm package deploy/charts/<CHART> --version <VERSION> --destination build/helm` and pushed to ghcr.io/openmeterio/helm-charts/. The version and appVersion fields in Chart.yaml must stay aligned with the container image tags.

key_file_guides.role: Runs helm-docs across both child charts using the shared template.md. The only command is `make docs`.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Ensure helm-docs is available in the environment (it is in the Nix CI shell). Running without it silently produces no output.

key_file_guides.role: Shared Go-template for helm-docs that defines badge helpers (versionBadge, typeBadge, appVersionBadge, artifactHubBadge) and the tldr / chart.base layout consumed by both child README templates.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Editing badge or section templates here affects both child chart READMEs. ArtifactHub badge URL is derived from `.Name`, so chart names must not change without updating ArtifactHub listings.

anti_patterns: Hand-editing a child chart README.md — it is generated by helm-docs from template.md and values.yaml comments
Adding a third chart here without a corresponding helm-docs README.tmpl.md and updating the Makefile
Storing shared Kubernetes manifests (CRDs, cluster-scoped RBAC) at this level — each chart must be self-contained
Publishing charts without aligning Chart.yaml appVersion with the container image tag used in values.yaml

decisions.decision: Shared template.md at deploy/charts level rather than duplicated per chart
decisions.rationale: Both charts share the same badge set and TL;DR install pattern; centralising the template ensures consistent branding and reduces duplication across helm-docs runs.

decisions.decision: OCI registry (ghcr.io) as the distribution channel, not a traditional Helm repository index
decisions.rationale: OCI registries are supported natively by Helm 3+ and integrate with the same GHCR credentials used for container images, simplifying the release pipeline.
